repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ot_dte_marginal angle3: fixed-threshold constrained OT bound / conditional-coupling path envelope

published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2010: Section 5 gives covariate sharp DTE bounds by conditioning on X and averaging conditional bounds

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ot_dte_marginal angle0/angle3: support-gap diagnostics for DTE path sharpness and finite-vector incompatibility

published_prior_art.cite: FanGuerreZhu2017 + FirpoRidder2019: covariate informativeness and finite-vector nonuniform sharpness, but not this pooled-vs-conditional support diagnostic

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ot_dte_marginal angle0: concrete finite nonzero witness for a DTE path support-gap diagnostic

published_prior_art.cite: Mullahy2023 and LuDingDasgupta2018 cover count/ordinal DTE bounds, not a covariate-aggregation loss witness

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The conditional Minkowski aggregation theorem is a routine restatement of covariate-conditioned sharp DTE bounds already covered by FanPark2010 Section 5, not a novel theorem.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the generic pooled-vs-conditional frontier lacks a valid non-corner concrete witness because the displayed Conjecture 2 witness has zero gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The discrete-outcome comparators Mullahy2023 and LuDingDasgupta2018 are cited without a section, equation, page, or quoted location tying them to the specific aggregation-loss gap.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: A_D(P)=0 only equalizes support functions on the finite class U_D; the proof sketch needs U_D to generate the normal fan, but that support-determining condition is not in the setup or assumptions.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: For the displayed center and u=(1,-1,0), the objective is -Pr(Y1-Y0=0), so the cellwise and pooled support values are all 0; the claimed pooled-minus-conditional gap at least 0.03 fails.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Conjecture 2 with a verified finite-support witness: compute the cellwise and pooled transportation LP certificates explicitly and print the primal/dual tables in Section 9.
Strengthen the definition of U_D so it is either the full normal fan of the two polytopes or a certified support-determining dictionary; then restate A_D against that dictionary.
Downgrade Theorem 1 to a known-baseline proposition and make the flagship claim solely the pooled-vs-conditional frontier against FanGuerreZhu2017/FirpoRidder2019.

recommended_next_step: Do not advance; redraft around a verified nonzero aggregation witness and a support-determining definition of A_D.
